name: Apache EventMesh
description: Event-driven multi-runtime infrastructure originated at WeBank and OPPO; CNCF-adjacent.

seo.title: Apache EventMesh — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: Apache EventMesh: Event-driven multi-runtime infrastructure originated at WeBank and OPPO; CNCF-adjacent.

when_to_use: Decoupling microservices with a cloud-native event bus
Bridging Kafka, RocketMQ, and HTTP events in one runtime
Event-driven orchestration for distributed microservice flows
Fanout of domain events to multiple heterogeneous consumers
CNCF-compliant event routing for multi-cloud architectures

pros: Pluggable runtime for multi-protocol event routing
Backed by large Chinese fintech production use
cons: Smaller community than Kafka or RocketMQ proper
Docs skew heavily toward Chinese deployments
review.verdict: Interesting event mesh for large orgs already in the Apache ecosystem; not a first pick for small teams.
review.best_for: Large orgs unifying events across Kafka, RocketMQ and HTTP
review.not_for: Startups that can solve messaging with a managed broker
